goal: Add a side-effect-free receipt record authority builder that records memory-cache audit export consume execution receipt record authorization from ready receipt record preflight while keeping permit consume, receipt recording, file writes, durable persistence, packages, workflows, deployment, DB, providers, GitHub, and external actions closed.
scope_out: Do not consume permits, record receipts, write export files, persist durable state, call providers, call DB, call GitHub, change package files, workflows, deployment files, or perform external actions.
claims: Ready memory-cache audit export consume execution receipt record preflight can produce a side-effect-free receipt record authorization artifact.
Receipt record authority id, authorizer, and expiry refs are required.
Receipt recording and file writes remain false.
assumptions: Actual receipt recording and export writing require later task locks.
dod: Ready, missing authority id, and blocked preflight cases are tested.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, and diff-check pass.
stop_conditions: Permit consumption, receipt recording, file write, durable persistence, external calls, DB, GitHub, package, workflow, deployment, or write changes become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-148 preflighted memory-cache audit export consume execution receipt record without recording it.
